@tetrisgm x Thanks for taking the time. They have 14 people (I’m gonna assume full time). The rest of that page is advisors and equivalent. That’s like an indie game team. When I say indie team, let’s look at Steam’s 2025 sales data: 65.9% earned under $1,000 gross revenue. 47.4% sold fewer than 100 copies.
